prompt: Create a sweet kawaii overhead portrait shot from directly above on a warm light-wood plank floor. On the right side, show a young woman lying on her back with her head near the upper right and feet toward the lower right, face softly blurred or featureless for privacy, long dark brown hair in two loose braids with a wavy strand spread beside her head. She wears a pastel pink and white lolita dress with puff sleeves, lace trim, a large waist bow, tiny pastel bows, delicate blue accents, and a full flared skirt decorated with cute bunny and bear motifs; add cream knee socks with pink bow details and glossy pink Mary Jane shoes. Arrange exactly 11 Sanrio-style plush toys in a large crescent arc around the left side of her body, leaving open space between the plush arc and the girl: 1 yellow bear plush in a cream outfit, 1 pink bear plush, 1 small white bear plush with a blue bow tie, 1 pink My Melody plush with floppy ears and bows, 1 My Melody plush in a pink gingham dress, 1 white Hello Kitty plush in a pale yellow dress, 1 pink My Melody plush in a white outfit, 1 brown Rilakkuma-like bear plush with a red bow, 1 pink bear plush in a blue uniform, 1 Hello Kitty plush in a blue outfit, and 1 white Hello Kitty plush with a blue bow. Use soft indoor lighting, gentle shadows, pastel colors, a cute Japanese kawaii aesthetic, realistic photography mixed with polished editorial styling, clean composition, high detail fabric texture, and a cozy dreamy mood. Customizable subject details: pastel pink and white, dark brown, 11, warm light-wood plank floor, sweet kawaii overhead portrait.
